name: Inflammation Response
description: Inflammation Response process visualization. This process flowchart outlines key steps, checks, and outputs.
mermaid:
graph TD
N1["Threat/Pathogen Exposure"]
N2["Recognition (innate sensors)"]
N3["Signal Amplification"]
N4["Effector Response"]
N5["Resolution/Memory (if any)"]
N6["Protection/Recovery"]

N1 --> N2
N2 --> N3
N3 --> N4
N4 --> N5
N5 --> N6

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
